# Reference

<!-- DO NOT EDIT: This document was generated by Puppet Strings -->

## Table of Contents

### Classes

* [`homebrew`](#homebrew): Manage Homebrew installation through the official macOS package.

### Defined types

* [`homebrew::tap`](#homebrew--tap): Manage a Homebrew tap.

## Classes

### <a name="homebrew"></a>`homebrew`

This class is intentionally opt-in. Declare it when Puppet should manage the
initial Homebrew installation, or leave it undeclared when Homebrew is
installed separately.

The implementation follows Homebrew's supported macOS package installation
path and is limited to Apple Silicon hosts running macOS Sonoma or newer. The
class does not manage the Xcode Command Line Tools; it only checks for their
presence before installation unless `require_clt` is set to `false`.

When no explicit `source` is provided, the installer defaults to Homebrew's
latest GitHub release package. Use `version` to pin a release while still
using the standard GitHub package URL, or `source` to provide an explicit
local path or remote package URL.

#### Examples

##### Install Homebrew from the latest release package

```puppet
class { 'homebrew': }
```

##### Install a specific Homebrew release

```puppet
class { 'homebrew':
  version => '5.1.0',
}
```

##### Install Homebrew for an alternate existing user

```puppet
class { 'homebrew':
  install_user => 'penny',
}
```

##### Remove Homebrew

```puppet
class { 'homebrew':
  ensure => 'absent',
}
```

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `homebrew` class:

* [`ensure`](#-homebrew--ensure)
* [`version`](#-homebrew--version)
* [`source`](#-homebrew--source)
* [`install_user`](#-homebrew--install_user)
* [`require_clt`](#-homebrew--require_clt)

##### <a name="-homebrew--ensure"></a>`ensure`

Data type: `Enum['present', 'absent']`

Whether Homebrew should be installed or removed.

Default value: `'present'`

##### <a name="-homebrew--version"></a>`version`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

Optional Homebrew release tag used to build the default GitHub package URL.
Ignored when `source` is set.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-homebrew--source"></a>`source`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

Optional explicit installer source. This may be a local path or a remote
package URL accepted by Puppet's `pkgdmg` provider.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-homebrew--install_user"></a>`install_user`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

Optional existing macOS account name written to
`/var/tmp/.homebrew_pkg_user.plist` before installation so the Homebrew
package installs for that user.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-homebrew--require_clt"></a>`require_clt`

Data type: `Boolean`

Whether to fail early when the Command Line Tools are not installed, as
reported by the `homebrew_clt_installed` fact.

Default value: `true`

## Defined types

### <a name="homebrew--tap"></a>`homebrew::tap`

Taps are managed through `brew tap` and `brew untap`, executed as the
Homebrew owner rather than as raw `root`.

When the `homebrew` class is declared with `install_user`, tap resources use
that account so the initial Homebrew installation and tap management can
happen in the same catalog run. Otherwise, the defined type falls back to the
`homebrew_owner` fact for already-installed Homebrew prefixes.

#### Examples

##### Add a tap from GitHub

```puppet
homebrew::tap { 'puppetlabs/puppet': }
```

##### Add a tap from a custom remote

```puppet
homebrew::tap { 'openvoxproject/openvox':
  source => 'https://github.com/openvoxproject/homebrew-openvox',
}
```

##### Remove a tap

```puppet
homebrew::tap { 'puppetlabs/puppet':
  ensure => 'absent',
}
```

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `homebrew::tap` defined type:

* [`ensure`](#-homebrew--tap--ensure)
* [`source`](#-homebrew--tap--source)

##### <a name="-homebrew--tap--ensure"></a>`ensure`

Data type: `Enum['present', 'absent']`

Whether the tap should be present or absent.

Default value: `'present'`

##### <a name="-homebrew--tap--source"></a>`source`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

Optional custom remote URL passed as the second argument to `brew tap`.

Default value: `undef`
